LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerTossedUp.label: 飛高高
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerTossedUp.stages.0.label: 飛高高
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerTossedUp.stages.0.descrip: 有人把我拋到高高的地方！咿呀！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerTickled.label: 被撓癢癢
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerTickled.stages.0.label: 被撓癢癢
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSpunAround.label: 轉圈
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSpunAround.stages.0.label: 轉圈
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSpunAround.stages.0.descr: 有人抱著我轉圈圈，轉呀轉呀轉！
LanguageData.RimTalk_PlayedWithToddler.label: 和幼兒玩耍
LanguageData.RimTalk_PlayedWithToddler.stages.0.label: 和幼兒玩耍
LanguageData.RimTalk_PlayedWithToddler.stages.0.descr: 和小家伙一起玩耍，心里暖暖的。
